posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Just like with board views, allow free movement of item page view tabs.

What are you trying to achieve

Currently, one can only mark item page view tabs as default or favorite. I am requesting for free and total movement of the item page view tabs.
